## Checklist
- [ ] TypeScript has no errors (`npm run type-check`)
- [ ] No new ESLint warnings (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] No environment secrets added to client-side code (use Supabase Edge Functions)
- [ ] New components wrapped with `<FeatureErrorBoundary>`
- [ ] Mock mode still functional (no `.env` required to run locally)
- [ ] Bundle size not significantly increased
